hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r FILE; BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE"); PARENT=$(dirname "$FILE"); if [ "$BASENAME" = "CLAUDE.md" ] && [ "$(basename "$PARENT")" != ".claude" ] && [ "$(basename "$PARENT")" != "rules" ]; then mkdir -p "$PARENT/.claude" && mv "$FILE" "$PARENT/.claude/CLAUDE.md"; fi; }
